--- a/src/hermes/commands/cli.py

 import logging
+import shlex
 import sys
 
 import click
@@ -63,7 +64,16 @@
     logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
     logger.setLevel(level)
 
-    logger.info("Running command: %s", " ".join(sys.argv))
+    argv = list(sys.argv)
+    masked_argv = []
+    i = 0
+    while i < len(argv):
+        masked_argv.append(argv[i])
+        if argv[i] == "-O" and i + 2 < len(argv):
+            masked_argv.append(argv[i + 1])
+            masked_argv.append("***")
+            i += 3
+            continue
+        i += 1
+    logger.info("Running command: %s", shlex.join(masked_argv))
 
     # Set colorize based on whether terminal supports color and no_color arg
     colorize = has_color and no_color is None

+        # Persist the generated state so it can be verified on callback.

@@ -177,6 +200,30 @@ class SSOBase(ABC):
             if response is None:
                 raise SSOLoginError(401, f"Failed to get access token! {content}")
 
+            expected_state = self._state
+            session = getattr(request, "session", None)
+            if session is not None:
+                expected_state = session.pop(_STATE_SESSION_KEY, expected_state)
+
+            if expected_state is None:
+                raise SSOLoginError(
+                    400,
+                    "Missing state verification context during authentication callback.",

+
+            received_state = request.query_params.get("state")

+                    "Missing state parameter during authentication callback.",

+            if not hmac.compare_digest(received_state, expected_state):

+                    "State parameter mismatch during authentication callback.",
+                )
+            self._state = None

             auth = response.get(self.access_token_key)

@@ -16,6 +17,22 @@ module StimulusReflex
         [reflex, method_name]
       end
+
+      private
+
+      def method_defined_on_reflex?(klass, method_name)
+        method = method_name.to_sym
+        ancestors = klass.ancestors[0..klass.ancestors.index(StimulusReflex::Reflex) - 1]
+
+        ancestors.any? { |ancestor| ancestor.public_instance_methods(false).include?(method) }
+      end
     end
 
     def self.reflex_class(class_name)
       klass = class_name.safe_constantize
       return unless klass&.<(StimulusReflex::Reflex)
@@ -24,6 +41,8 @@ module StimulusReflex
 
       klass
     end
+
+    private_class_method :method_defined_on_reflex?
   end
 end
diff --git a/test/reflex_factory_test.rb b/test/reflex_factory_test.rb
index 34f0f0a..a2ab6f1 100644
--- a/test/reflex_factory_test.rb
+++ b/test/reflex_factory_test.rb
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 # frozen_string_literal: true
 
 require "test_helper"
+require "ostruct"
 
 class StimulusReflex::ReflexFactoryTest < ActiveSupport::TestCase
   test ".call returns reflex and method name for valid target" do
@@ -14,4 +15,28 @@ class StimulusReflex::ReflexFactoryTest < ActiveSupport::TestCase
     assert_nil reflex
     assert_nil method_name
   end
+
+  test ".call rejects methods not explicitly defined on the reflex class hierarchy" do
+    channel = OpenStruct.new(connection: nil)
+    data = {target: "ExampleReflex#instance_variable_set"}
+
+    reflex, method_name = StimulusReflex::ReflexFactory.call(channel, data)
+
+    assert_nil reflex
+    assert_nil method_name
+  end
+
+  test ".call allows methods defined on an ancestor before StimulusReflex::Reflex" do
+    channel = OpenStruct.new(connection: nil)
+    data = {target: "InheritedExampleReflex#foo"}
+
+    reflex, method_name = StimulusReflex::ReflexFactory.call(channel, data)
+
+    assert_instance_of InheritedExampleReflex, reflex
+    assert_equal "foo", method_name
+  end
 end

--- a/src/transformers/models/marian/tokenization_marian.py

@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 import json
 import os
 import re
+from functools import lru_cache
 from pathlib import Path
 from shutil import copyfile
 from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Tuple
@@ -103,6 +104,20 @@ SPIECE_UNDERLINE = "▁"
 VOCAB_FILES_NAMES = {"source_spm": "source.spm", "target_spm": "target.spm", "vocab": "vocab.json"}
 
 
+@lru_cache(maxsize=256)
+def _safe_compile_regex(pattern: str):
+    if len(pattern) > 256:
+        raise ValueError("Regex pattern is too long.")
+    return re.compile(pattern)
+
+
+def _safe_regex_search(pattern: str, text: str) -> bool:
+    if len(text) > 1024:
+        return False
+    try:
+        return _safe_compile_regex(pattern).search(text) is not None
+    except re.error:
+        return False
+
 class MarianTokenizer(PreTrainedTokenizer):
     r"""
     Construct a Marian tokenizer. Based on [SentencePiece](https://github.com/google/sentencepiece).
@@ -338,7 +353,7 @@ class MarianTokenizer(PreTrainedTokenizer):
         if self.separate_vocabs:
             return self.target_encoder.get(token, self.target_unk_token_id)
         else:
-            return self.encoder.get(token, self.unk_token_id)
+            return self.encoder.get(token, self.unk_token_id)
 
     def convert_tokens_to_string(self, tokens: List[str]) -> str:
         """Uses source spm if _decode_use_source_tokenizer is True, and target spm otherwise"""
@@ -365,3 +380,14 @@ class MarianTokenizer(PreTrainedTokenizer):
         text = self.remove_language_code(text)
         text = self.spm_source.DecodePieces(list(tokens))
         return self.clean_up_tokenization(text)
+
+    def _do_use_weight_decay(
+        self,
+        param_name: str,
+        include_in_weight_decay: Optional[List[str]] = None,
+        exclude_from_weight_decay: Optional[List[str]] = None,
+    ) -> bool:
+        if include_in_weight_decay:
+            return any(_safe_regex_search(pattern, param_name) for pattern in include_in_weight_decay)
+        if exclude_from_weight_decay:
+            return not any(_safe_regex_search(pattern, param_name) for pattern in exclude_from_weight_decay)
+        return True

+function getSafeImageAttachmentFilename(
+  upstreamType: string | null,
+  url: URL
+): string | null {
+  if (!upstreamType) return null
+
+  const mime = upstreamType.split(';', 1)[0].trim().toLowerCase()
+  const extension = getExtension(mime)
+
+  if (!extension) return null
+
+  const pathname = url.pathname || ''
+  const lastSegment = pathname.split('/').pop() || 'image'
+  const basename = lastSegment.replace(/\.[^.]*$/, '') || 'image'
+  const safeBase = basename.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/g, '_').replace(/^[_\. -]+|[_\. -]+$/g, '')
+
+  return `${safeBase || 'image'}.${extension}`
+}
+

   req: IncomingMessage,
   res: ServerResponse,
@@ -712,6 +736,7 @@ function setResponseHeaders(

   res.setHeader(
@@ -722,6 +747,17 @@ function setResponseHeaders(
